description: Full H+M×H+M betweenness centrality on Holdat LLC CSV (1,670 unified seal sequences)

corpus.source: Holdat LLC Indus Corpus V3 (Miller 2025) — CSV via position column
corpus.note: Corpus loader corrected 2026-05-22: now uses Holdat LLC CSV with unified per-seal sequences (sorted by position column). Prior runs used the RMRL Firestore corpus (indus_corpus_v3.load_corpus) which split inscriptions by sideline, causing M267 to appear 81 % INITIAL instead of 81 % MEDIAL.
